results.justification: EXACT TWIN — weight-only per-band scaling + interpolation-aware stabilization + per-band frequency grouping IS the dual-ring per-head phase quantization + coherence loss mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — head-specific band-specific frequency assignment + elite-set selection IS the 8-solar K_solar + 13-lunar K_lunar dual-ring per-head allocation mechanism.
Log-spaced banded RoPE + per-band scaling + axis-aligned quantization overlaps with 8-spoke + 13-phase quantized dual-ring mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — per-head frequency-band selection + interpolation-extrapolation trade-off + base-frequency tuning IS the dual-ring per-head ring-allocation mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — learnable phase function into attention + per-token phase encoding IS the phase-anchor mechanism with discretized ring positions.
RoPE rotary cycle analysis + per-head frequency utilization + cycle alignment overlaps with 8-phase + 13-phase ring alignment mechanism.
Comparative analysis of RoPE variants + per-head frequency distribution overlaps with dual-ring per-head ring-allocation mechanism.
Block-wise positional encoding + phase-locked blocks + per-block reset overlaps with Saulgrieži leap-adjust 4-anchor reset mechanism.
